sets.name: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
sets.description: Essential cloud computing terms every IT professional should know — service models, networking, DevOps, security, and cost.

sets.name: Project Management Fundamentals
sets.description: Key project management concepts and terminology — methodologies, tools, roles, and best practices for successful project delivery.

sets.name: Business Analysis Fundamentals
sets.description: Key business analysis concepts and terminology — requirements gathering, stakeholder management, process modeling, and solution assessment.

sets.name: Software Engineering Fundamentals
sets.description: Core software engineering concepts and terminology — design patterns, testing, version control, architecture, and development methodologies.

sets.name: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
sets.description: Foundational Microsoft Azure concepts covered in the AZ-900 certification — cloud services, identity, networking, and pricing.

sets.name: Azure AI Fundamentals (AI-900)
sets.description: Foundational Azure AI and machine learning concepts for the AI-900 certification — ML types, Cognitive Services, and Responsible AI.

sets.name: Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900)
sets.description: Foundational Azure data and analytics concepts for the DP-900 certification — relational, NoSQL, ETL, streaming, and Power BI.

sets.name: Microsoft 365 Fundamentals (MS-900)
sets.description: Foundational Microsoft 365 concepts for the MS-900 certification — Teams, SharePoint, Intune, Defender, and licensing.

sets.name: Security, Compliance & Identity (SC-900)
sets.description: Foundational Microsoft security, compliance, and identity concepts for the SC-900 certification — Entra, Sentinel, Purview, and Intune.

sets.name: Power Platform Fundamentals (PL-900)
sets.description: Foundational Microsoft Power Platform concepts for the PL-900 certification — Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, and Dataverse.

sets.name: Dynamics 365 Fundamentals CRM (MB-910)
sets.description: Foundational Dynamics 365 customer engagement and CRM concepts for the MB-910 certification — Sales, Service, Field Service, and Marketing.

sets.name: Dynamics 365 Fundamentals ERP (MB-920)
sets.description: Foundational Dynamics 365 finance and operations ERP concepts for the MB-920 certification — Finance, Supply Chain, Commerce, and HR.

sets.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot & Agent Administration Fundamentals (AB-900)
sets.description: Foundational concepts for managing Microsoft 365 Copilot and AI agents — deployment, security, governance, compliance, and responsible AI.

sets.name: Microsoft AI Business Professional (AB-730)
sets.description: Business-focused AI concepts — identifying use cases, mapping workflows, and applying Microsoft Copilot to improve productivity and decision-making.

sets.name: Microsoft AI Transformation Leader (AB-731)
sets.description: Strategic AI concepts — leading organizational AI adoption, aligning business goals, governance, and driving transformation with Microsoft Copilot and Azure AI.

sets.name: GitHub Copilot Fundamentals (GH-900)
sets.description: Foundational GitHub Copilot concepts for the GH-900 certification — code completion, chat, and integration with development workflows.
